question.label: Independence support
question.name: What support from me would help you ship with less second-guessing?
question.description: Surfaces the manager touchpoint that would reduce reassurance dependence over the next two weeks.

answer: If we define what good looks like for my next two tickets, I will feel much steadier.

assessment.note: Names a specific missing support — defining what good looks like on the next two tickets — which signals current clarity is lacking and confidence to act is dampened.

new_queue.label: Next focus
new_queue.name: Given what we covered, where do you want to focus first?

history.answer_excerpt: I can do the tasks, but I still second-guess whether my approach matches team expectations.
When feedback is specific and fast, I move much quicker.
I still feel fuzzy on where quality bars differ between quick fixes and core flows.
If we define what good looks like for my next two tickets, I will feel much steadier.
